title: The Mysterious Vanishing of Flight MH370

scenes.text: In 2014, Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 vanished with 239 people on board.
Despite extensive searches, wreckage was found only years later.
Multiple theories about its disappearance emerged but none confirmed.
The fate of Flight MH370 remains one of aviation's biggest mysteries.
scenes.query: dramatic visual of the Indian Ocean

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: The disappearance of Flight MH370 is one of the most significant unsolved aviation mysteries in history, leaving 239 people unaccounted for. Stay tuned for more captivating true crime stories.
